creator: doralitze@chaotikum.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #3)
Don't worry about that too much. A tiny child is the highest priority a person could and should have. In the mean time is it possible to mark this port as broken so one can manually fix the mediawiki installations and let poudriere handle it again once the issue has been fixed?

It doesn't compile with default options as well and textproc/php71-xmlreader doesn't have a config file at all. I sorry but I cat't debug this myself since I don't know anything about the internals of php but if there is anything how I could help you further I'd love to.
